title: A Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal School Board (MSB) Resolution No. 2022-12 Dated October 4,2022, Entitled ?resolution Appropriating the Amount of Two Hundred Thousand Pesos (P200,000.00) Chargeable Against the 2021 Special Education Fund Savings for the Immediate Purchase of Various Equipment and Consumables for Fire Stricken Lopez Elementary School.?
